kw.name: Open Available Browser
kw.doc: Attempts to open a browser on the user's device from a set of supported browsers. Automatically downloads a corresponding webdriver if none is already installed.
kw.msg: Webdriver version taken into use: ChromeDriver 146.0.7680.165 (4b989da09e15a7dc0de0785cb5ff232aadae3f0f-refs/branch-heads/7680@{#2932})
Creating an instance of the Chrome WebDriver.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

errors.msg: This is a deprecated import that will be removed in favor of Autosphere.Browser.Selenium
